resultList.dtldesc: This property comes with 60 Sq. Yards of Undivided Land in this most expensive neighborhood. At Rs.250k per Sq.Yd, the Market Value of share in undivided land is higher than flat cost...  A perfect amalgamation of style and elegance, this splendid 3BHK flat nestled in Suraksha Residency, Whitefield Road, Opposite HDFC Bank, Kondapur is worth investing your time and money. Spacious rooms, attractive interiors and prime location are the key highlights of this abode. Sarath Mall, AMB Movies are just a walking distance. This White field road area is one the upscale areas of the city, officially called as Golden Habitat. Therefore, owning a residence here will be a fruitful decision. So, hurry up. Property Specifications perfectly positioned on the 2nd floor of a 5 storeyed building, this property is abundantly blessed with fresh air and sunlight, therefore you need not depend on artificial lights during the day time. Four Balconies, for you to bask in open air. Facing the promising east direction, this flat is beautifully designed as per Vaastu guidelines for the well being and happiness of the residents. Measuring a super area of 1570 sqft, this abode incorporates 3 bedrooms, living room, dining room, pooja room, store room, modular kitchen, 3 bathrooms and 4 balconies. The flat comes semi furnished with fans, cots and wardrobes for more convenience. The modular kitchen is well appointed with a cooking countertop, sink and cabinets to ensure convenient cooking to the homemaker. The high quality granite flooring further gives this abode a rich and elegant look. Offering unblocked views of the main road and other flats, all 4 balconies separately linked with the 3 bedrooms and kitchen are perfect for enjoying your cup of tea or coffee. Furthermore, all 3 bathrooms are western fashioned of which 1 is common and 2 are attached to 2 bedrooms. Moreover, geysers are available in 2 of the bathrooms for hot water supply. Facilities To facilitate the needs of the residents, prime facilities such as one covered parking space, 24x7 water supply, 1 lift, reserved parking, security, visitor parking and maintenance staff are available. Locality The famous Botanical Garden is the nearest landmark for this property. A number of renowned educational institutions, hospitals, shopping malls and supermarkets are present within 1 furlong. For all your banking work, you can find renowned banks and ATMs within the vicinity.  HDFC recently opened their branch just opposite to our complex. Whitefields has strong connectivity to the rest of the city with the help of autos, buses and taxis. Raidurg Metro is just a 5 minute ride from here.
